message:
style: apply rustfmt across test suite and eprocess_guardrail

Automated formatting pass applying consistent line-break and
whitespace conventions across 78 test files and the eprocess
guardrail module. Changes are purely cosmetic — no logic,
assertion, or test coverage modifications.

Typical adjustments include collapsing short chained method calls
onto single lines, splitting long single-line expressions, and
reformatting assert macro arguments with trailing closures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     let value: Value = serde_json::from_str(&raw).expect("parse JSON");

     // every query field must also appear in logging fields so evidence can be reconstructed from logs
     for qf in &query_fields {

@@ -520,7 +520,10 @@ fn backlog_families_have_valid_current_status() {
     let backlog = load_grammar_closure_backlog();
     for family in &backlog.families {
         assert!(
-            matches!(family.current_status.as_str(), "supported" | "partial" | "unsupported"),
